1303.reason: [The error line number should correspond to the line where the last non-terminal before the semicolon is located, but currentLine may not be accurate if the expression spans multiple lines]

1330.reason: [The error line number should be the line of the last token in the expression, not the initial token line. Using currentLine (from the beginning of statement) is incorrect when expression spans multiple lines]
